NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THIS HEARING WAS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. TAYLOR-RUSH V MULTI TECH CORPORATION (1990) 217 CAL APP 3RD 103 IS ON POINT. THIS HEARING IS FURTHER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 15, 2010 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO CONDUCT LIMITED JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY THROUGH DEPOSITIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS PARTICIPATED IN OR DIRECTED A TORTIOUS ACT OR OMMISSION EITHER WITHIN OR WITHOUT CALIFORNIA. SEE TAYLOR V. RUSH AT PAGE 114. FURTHER OPPOSITION DUE DECEMBER 2. FURTHER REPLY DUE DECEMBER 8. COURTESY COPIES DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. (302)

Notice And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS RICHARD HURST, WAYNE GRONQUIST, AND GEORGE MCCARTHY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THIS HEARING WAS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. TAYLOR-RUSH V MULTI TECH CORPORATION (1990) 217 CAL APP 3RD 103 IS ON POINT. THIS HEARING IS FURTHER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 15, 2010 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO CONDUCT LIMITED jurisdictional DISCOVERY THROUGH DEPOSITIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS PARTICIPATED IN OR DIRECTED A TORTIOUS ACT OR OMMISSION EITHER WITHIN OR WITHOUT CALIFORNIA. SEE TAYLOR V. RUSH AT PAGE 114. FURTHER OPPOSITION DUE DECEMBER 2. FURTHER REPLY DUE DECEMBER 8. COURTESY COPIES DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
